items.title: Reduce Manual Effort by 70%
items.description: Automate complex, multi-step tasks across AD, Azure, and Intune. Enable junior IT staff to resolve issues securely.

items.title: Enhance Security & Compliance
items.description: Minimise privileged access, eliminate standing local admin rights, and enforce security policies consistently.

items.title: Optimise IT Costs
items.description: Eliminate wasted spend on unused M365 licences and reclaim thousands of man-hours from repetitive tasks.

items.title: Simple Commercial Model

features.title: Built for Modern IT Operations
features.subtitle: Comprehensive capabilities designed to meet the demands of enterprise environments

technicalFeatures.title: Technical Architecture & Capabilities
technicalFeatures.description: A modular automation orchestration layer designed for Hybrid Microsoft Environments. Bridges the operational gap between on-premise Active Directory, Azure Entra ID, Microsoft Intune, and Exchange Online via secure API-driven architecture.

capabilities.title: Hybrid Identity Logic Engine
capabilities.description: Automates complex identity lifecycle management by handling directory logic that native tools often leave manual.

features.title: Collision Handling & Sanitation
features.desc: Generates unique UPNs and collision-free IDs, sanitizing credentials to exclude ambiguous characters (e.g., 'I', 'l', '0', 'O').

features.title: Attribute Orchestration
features.desc: Automates OU path calculation based on Business Unit/Location logic and syncs extensionAttributes (7, 8, 12) for downstream compatibility.

features.title: Persona-Based Entitlements
features.desc: Dynamically assigns License SKUs (E1/E3/F1) and Security Group memberships based on validated user personas.

capabilities.title: Agentless Endpoint Security (LAPS)
capabilities.description: Replaces static local administrative rights with a dynamic, time-bound Least Privilege model without dedicated agent installation.

features.title: Agentless Rotation
features.desc: Leverages CrowdStrike APIs or Intune scripts to automate monthly rotation of local admin passwords across the fleet.

features.title: Secure Transport
features.desc: Passwords secured at rest and in transit using 4K-certified encryption.

features.title: Ephemeral Access
features.desc: Credentials function on TTL basis, automatically expiring and rotating within 4 hours to prevent reuse.

capabilities.title: API-Driven Intune Operations
capabilities.description: Exposes specific Microsoft Graph API endpoints to democratize complex Intune operations without granting broad 'Intune Administrator' roles.

features.title: Hardware Hash Injection
features.desc: Direct API capability to upload Hardware Hashes (Autopilot) and Mac Serial Numbers (ABM) directly into Intune tenant.

features.title: Lifecycle Cleanup
features.desc: Executes 'Safe Removal' protocols purging records from AD, Azure AD, Intune, and Autopilot to prevent sync conflicts.

features.title: BitLocker Auditing
features.desc: Secure retrieval of BitLocker recovery keys from AD/Azure AD with mandatory immutable logging.

capabilities.title: Standard Operating Environment (SOE)
capabilities.description: A zero-touch deployment engine designed for Windows 11 migration and standardization at scale.

features.title: Universal Image Architecture
features.desc: Deploys single, hardened Windows 11 image across multi-vendor hardware using Real-Time Driver Injection.

features.title: Security Hardening
features.desc: Automates adherence to CIS/NIST benchmarks by disabling vulnerable services and enforcing secure policies pre-boot.

features.title: Backend Agnostic
features.desc: Supports SCCM and MDT infrastructures with parallel deployment over LAN or offline via USB for air-gapped sites.

capabilities.title: Exchange & Collaboration Governance
capabilities.description: Automates granular Exchange tasks typically requiring high-level RBAC assignments.

features.title: Temporal Delegation
features.desc: Automates 'Full Access' and 'Send-As' delegation with mandatory expiry parameters for automatic revocation.

features.title: Traffic Control
features.desc: Enforces strictly internal-only email forwarding rules to prevent data exfiltration to external domains.

features.title: Distribution Architecture
features.desc: Manages DL creation logic and ownership attributes without manual Exchange Admin Center interaction.

capabilities.title: Security & Audit Framework
capabilities.description: Comprehensive compliance and traceability layer for all automated operations.

features.title: Validated Execution
features.desc: Automation triggers gated by ITSM integration; operations only execute upon validated, approved ticket ID.

features.title: Immutable Audit Trails
features.desc: Every action logged for ISMS/ISO compliance, providing full traceability of 'Who, What, and When' for every task.

mainHero.description1: Manual IT operations are costly, error-prone, and expose organizations to security risks. Human inefficiencies lead to license waste, compliance gaps, and operational bottlenecks that drain resources and increase expenses.
mainHero.description2: AIObz transforms your IT landscape with proactive automation and AI-driven analytics. Eliminate manual errors, optimize license costs, strengthen security posture, and gain predictive insights—all while reducing operational overhead by up to 70%.

itControlBox.title: IT Control Box
itControlBox.subtitle: Complete IT Operations Control
itControlBox.description: Enterprise-grade automation for Identity Management, Device Deployment, and O365 License Optimization. Eliminate manual processes, strengthen security, and reduce operational costs.

itam.title: ITAM - IT Asset Management
itam.subtitle: Intelligent Asset Discovery & Lifecycle Management
itam.description: Enterprise-grade ITAM platform with automated hybrid IT discovery, ITIL-compliant CMDB, dynamic dependency mapping, and granular software metering. Eliminate blind spots and optimize IT spend.

aiObz.title: AI OBZ
aiObz.subtitle: Predictive Observability Platform

q1.question: Do you have persona based O365 licenses allocation?

q2.question: As per you, how many users have higher 365 subscription than they actually use or need?

q3.question: Is your HR / L&D Team empowered to control the violations of HR or L&D policies or KPIs?

q4.question: What is the lead time to decommission or downgrade the users temp license?

q5.question: Do you monitor actual O365 consumptions vs license allocation?

q6.question: Are you aware of the exceptions such as USB access, group memberships aligned to the persona changes?

q7.question: Are your sr IT Leads busy in end user management complex tasks such as encryption, bit locker, group policy?
options: No, completely managed by Jr team

q8.question: Do you have end point protection rollout automation?

q9.question: Do you track # of devices per user?

q10.question: How do you manage geo fencing for the roaming users and exceptions?
options: Low request - less than 30 per month

q11.question: How many BitLocker incidents / requests do you get per month needing manual intervention?

q12.question: How many requests do you receive per month to remove, change mobile device or policy?

q13.question: How many users have local admin access?

q15.question: Do IT manager or security manager get the easy to action reports about exceptions?

q16.question: Do you have Identity Quarantine automation across multiple platforms and apps?

q17.question: Do you have multiple teams to manage AD, Azure, Intune? Are there gaps causing sync issues?

q18.question: Do you have secured automation in certificate management?

q19.question: Do you know how many users reuse the same passwords, or non-compliant passwords?

q20.question: Do your users use password reset self service? How much time your IT support spend monthly on these requests?

q21.question: How frequently the HR updates related to role, division, location, etc are synchronized with AD?

q22.question: How many local admin access you have provided? For how long?

q23.question: How many shared licenses are allocated based on function or usage by multiple personal or services?

q24.question: Is there automation to create IT support teams accounts?

q25.question: What are the % of tickets escalated by L1 to L2 for troubleshooting?

q26.question: What is the % of end user failed in mock phishing?

q27.question: What is the % of end user password reset, MFA reset tickets resolved by self service or automation?

q28.question: Are your approvers enabled to understand impact of cost or security while approving requests?

q29.question: Are your IT manager / leads enabled with the tools for quick audit and forensics of IDAM?

q30.question: Did you have any service disruptions due to certification expiry?

q31.question: Do you have audit reports to track access during entire lifecycle or time duration?

q32.question: Do you have automated control of the access changes based on changes in role?

q33.question: Do you have automation for mass onboarding / deboarding?

q34.question: Do your team or supplier track new threats to identity and access especially in the application landscape?

q35.question: How frequently do you track excess access (continued access when people change roles)?
options: Less than 10% people may have excess access

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.visionQuote: "Enable clients and their support teams to deliver higher value from the existing IT tools and technologies."
aboutUs.indiaAddress: Swami Krupa 4/704, Kolshet Road, Dhokali, Thane, Maharashtra – 400607

mahesh.name: Mahesh Koli
mahesh.bio1: Mahesh Koli is the Co-Founder of IT Control Box and a seasoned global IT transformation executive with over 30 years of experience helping enterprises modernize their technology landscapes. Prior to founding IT Control Box, Mahesh spent 15+ years with the Capgemini & Sogeti Group, where he served as Vice President – Cloud Transformation and Delivery, leading large-scale programs for global clients.
mahesh.bio2: Throughout his career, Mahesh has worked extensively across Banking, Insurance, Pharma, Automotive, and Manufacturing sectors, delivering measurable outcomes in Cloud Transformation, Cyber Security, Digital Workplace, End-User Computing (EUC), and Application Modernization. His leadership has consistently driven business growth, innovation, and operational efficiency at scale.
mahesh.bio3: In addition to Capgemini, Mahesh has held senior leadership roles with leading product and platform companies such as Majesco, Mirantis (Docker ecosystem), Yodlee (Evernet), as well as OEMs including HP and Acer. He has served in diverse roles—Country Head, CIO, Business Unit Head, Portfolio Leader, Delivery & Operations Head, and Management Consultant—building high-performing teams, defining go-to-market strategies, developing partnerships, scaling accounts, and delivering sustained profitability across regions.
mahesh.quote: "I am excited to bring my global experience to address critical IT challenges that are often overlooked by large product and services organizations. Having worked across the US, UK, Europe, the Middle East, and APAC, I strongly believe in solving real, operational problems with pragmatic, automation-first solutions. With the support of our early-adopter clients, we are seeing this vision take shape in a very tangible way."

vinod.name: Vinod Dadhe
vinod.bio1: Vinod Dadhe is the Co-Founder of IT Control Box and serves as Operations Director at Vinit Consulting. He brings over 25 years of deep technical and operational experience in Microsoft enterprise technologies, with strong expertise in Exchange, Microsoft 365 (M365), SCCM, Intune, Azure Entra, and related Microsoft platforms.
vinod.bio2: Vinod has worked across Manufacturing, Banking, IT Services, and OEM product organizations, supporting enterprises worldwide with technology implementations, system integrations, and automation initiatives. His hands-on background enables him to bridge the gap between IT strategy and day-to-day operational realities.
vinod.bio3: Over the years, Vinod has designed and delivered numerous IT automations for end-user support, particularly around Active Directory, M365, Intune, SCCM, and identity-driven workflows. His work reflects a deep understanding of the challenges faced by end users, IT support teams, and security functions alike.
vinod.quote: "I've spent years delivering automation solutions for end-user support and Microsoft platforms, and I've seen firsthand where traditional tools fall short. By combining real customer feedback with practical automation experience, we have built IT Control Box to help organizations get far more value from their existing Microsoft investments. Now, we're ready to scale this impact globally."

successStories.videoDescription: See how enterprises achieve operational excellence with IT Control Box automation
successStories.shareTitle: Share this success story on LinkedIn
successStories.ctaTitle: Ready to Write Your Success Story?
successStories.ctaDescription: Join leading enterprises who have transformed their IT operations with IT Control Box.

stories.title: Mastering Global Deployment
stories.subtitle: Proven Scale, Efficiency, and Reach at Enterprise Scale
stories.challenge: A large multinational enterprise faced the immense task of deploying Windows 11 across a diverse and complex array of international and domestic sites. The manual effort required would have been immense, risking inconsistencies, delays, and significant strain on IT resources.
stories.solution: The organization utilized the IT Control Box's Standard Operating Environment (SOE) automation tool for mass deployment. The solution provided a single, universal Windows 11 image that supports all business units, locations, and multiple hardware models (HP, Dell, Lenovo), ensuring consistency and security hardening based on industry best practices.
highlights: Successfully deployed across sites including Grangemouth, Lexington, Sellersville, Kurla, Lower Parel, and Digwal
Seamless management of fleet in transition between Windows 10 (7,896 units) and Windows 11 (7,554 units)
Universal image supporting multiple hardware vendors

stories.title: Securing 20,000+ Endpoints
stories.subtitle: Automated Password Management at Scale
stories.challenge: Unmanaged local administrator privileges across a massive enterprise fleet created a critical attack vector. The organization needed visibility and control over 20,000+ assets across Corporate, Partner, and Warehouse units.
stories.solution: The organization deployed the IT Control Box LAPs App for agentless, automated local admin password management. The system provides real-time password rotation, fleet visibility, and inventory intelligence.
highlights: 17,634 administrative passwords changed successfully with high reliability
Identified 'Top 20 Slowest Systems' with boot times from 20 to 582 minutes for proactive maintenance

stories.title: Driving Financial Efficiency in O365
stories.subtitle: License Management at Enterprise Scale
stories.challenge: An enterprise with thousands of users struggled to track Office 365 license consumption across numerous SKUs (E1, E3, F1, Project, Visio) and business units. This lack of visibility led to over-provisioning, wasted budget, and a reactive approach to license availability.
stories.solution: The organization deployed the Office 365 License Management tool within the IT Control Box. The system provides real-time tracking of procured licenses versus actual usage for each SKU and business group, with automated weekly reporting and a multi-stage approval process for new license reservations.
highlights: Real-time tracking across E1, E3, EOA, M365F1, M365F3, EMS E3, and more SKUs
Automated weekly reporting for license utilization
Multi-stage approval process for new license reservations

identityMgmt.title: Zero-Touch User Lifecycle & Secure IT Administration
identityMgmt.description: A single interface for secure, delegated daily IT administration. Automate the entire identity lifecycle while enforcing policies consistently from onboarding to offboarding.
identityMgmt.lifecycleSubtitle: Interfacing with your HR data and ITSM tools as the single source of truth
joinerFeatures: Automate user creation based on HRMS data and policies
Integrate with ServiceNow to validate requests
Provision birthright access based on persona, location, and BU
moverFeatures: Persona Change Control: Automatic partial access revocation
Excess Access Detection: Audit persona vs actual access
leaverFeatures: Timely revocation of all access, synced with HR records
Handle bulk deboarding for M&A or vendor projects
Complete audit trail of all access changes
identityMgmt.centralizedDesc: A "single pane of glass" for your support team, integrated directly into Microsoft Teams. Automates operational tasks, reducing the need for privileged admin accounts.
identityMgmt.lapsDesc: Eliminate standing local admin privileges on endpoints. Utilises CrowdStrike APIs or Intune scripts to automatically rotate local admin passwords monthly—no additional agent required.
lapsFeatures: Agentless password rotation via CrowdStrike or Intune
Secure Teams app for on-demand password retrieval
Auto-change password within 4 hours after access
Proactive endpoint intelligence and health monitoring
identityMgmt.igaDesc: Comprehensive reporting and rapid response capabilities for proactive security management.
igaFeatures: Identity Exceptions Report: Sync gaps, inactive users, policy exceptions
Identity Quarantine: Instantly disable ID in AD, Azure, and apps
Automated Threat Response: Password reset, forced logoff, MFA—no E5 needed
Automated Host Name Recycling across AD, Azure, and Intune
identityMgmt.complianceDesc: Maintain a complete, auditable trail of all administrative activities for full traceability.
complianceFeatures: Track and report on all access changes per identity
Detect internal exploits with access lifecycle audit
Approval enablement with cost impact visibility
identityMgmt.forLeadershipDesc: Enhanced governance, reduced risk, accelerated incident response
identityMgmt.forITManagersDesc: Increased efficiency, faster team onboarding, cost optimization
identityMgmt.forITSupportDesc: Single pane of glass, empowered junior staff, faster troubleshooting

deviceMgmt.title: Deploy Secure, Standardised Endpoints in Minutes, Not Days
deviceMgmt.description: Deploy a consistent, secure, and fully configured Windows environment across all hardware. Our SOE solution uses a single universal image, enabling mass remote deployment with virtually no IT skill required.
deviceMgmt.refCase: Global Pharma Reference Case - UK, US, India
deviceMgmt.soeDesc: A single Windows 11 image supports all hardware (HP, Dell, Lenovo) and business units, with custom apps deployed automatically. No separate images to maintain.
soeFeatures: Single image for all hardware vendors and models
Custom apps deployed automatically per business unit
Automated driver injection for 20+ hardware models
Customizable yet repeatable based on geography and role
deviceMgmt.hardeningDesc: Implements industry best practices like CIS, NIST, and ISO27001 frameworks, disabling vulnerable services and enforcing policies from deployment.
hardeningFeatures: CIS Level 1 and Level 2 benchmark enforcement
deviceMgmt.zeroTouchDesc: Works with MDT or SCCM to deliver a silent, fully automated installation over the network or via USB for remote sites. Systems are automatically joined to AD or Azure AD.
zeroTouchFeatures: Silent, fully automated installation—no user interaction
Network PXE boot or USB deployment for remote sites
Auto domain join to AD or Azure AD
Virtually no IT skill required at remote sites
deviceMgmt.lapsDesc: Eliminate standing local admin privileges on all deployed endpoints with integrated Local Admin Password Solution for complete endpoint security.
lapsFeatures: Automatic password rotation on deployed systems
Secure on-demand access via Microsoft Teams
deviceMgmt.ctaTitle: Ready to Scale Your Device Deployment?
deviceMgmt.ctaDesc: See how our device management automation can transform your Windows deployment

o365Mgmt.title: Eliminate License Waste and Enforce Accountability
o365Mgmt.description: Managing thousands of users across multiple O365 SKUs (E1, E3, E5, Project) is a major challenge. Our automated system provides a real-time, accurate inventory, enabling you to stop overspending and assign costs back to the business.
o365Mgmt.refCase: Global Pharma Reference Case - Europe & India
o365Mgmt.personaAllocationDesc: Dynamically assign correct licence based on department, role, or location
o365Mgmt.shortTermMgmtDesc: Automate allocation and revocation of temporary licences
o365Mgmt.costAccountabilityDesc: Track and report usage per business group with automated emails
o365Mgmt.optimizationInsightsDesc: Identify overutilised SKUs and unused licences on disabled accounts
o365Mgmt.realTimeSummaryDesc: Clarity at a glance: Track procured vs. used licences across all SKUs including E1, E3, E5, EMS E3, M365 F1, F3, and more. Know exactly where your licences are and who's using them.

User count by business name and division
Detection of unused and underutilized licenses
o365Mgmt.costAllocationDesc: Track and report licence usage per business group with automated weekly emails to stakeholders. Enable accurate chargebacks and cost accountability across the organization.

Export to Excel, PDF, and CSV formats

itamAlt.heroDesc: Comprehensive IT Asset Management, Hybrid Discovery, and Automated CMDB — designed for the Mid-Market.
itamAlt.frictionTitle: The Friction in Modern IT Operations
itamAlt.frictionDesc: Enterprise Management Associates (EMA) reveals that real-time discovery and CMDB maturity are the critical keys to ServiceOps success. Relying on manual spreadsheets or fragmented point solutions leads to inaccurate data, bloated software spending, and severe security blind spots.
itamAlt.blueprintDesc: Four interconnected modules that work together to deliver complete IT visibility.
itamAlt.integrationsDesc: Play nice with your existing ecosystem. Zero vendor lock-in.
itamAlt.kvpDesc: Agile, scalable yet simple and efficient.
itamAlt.ctaTitle: Stop Managing Assets in the Dark
itamAlt.ctaDesc: Achieve total visibility, ensure unwavering compliance, and build a configuration foundation you can actually trust.

problems.problem: Blind spots in hybrid and WFA environments.
problems.solution: Automated, agentless, and agent-based continuous discovery.

problems.problem: High failure rate of manual CMDB updates.
problems.solution: ITIL-compliant, automatically populated single source of truth.

problems.problem: Unintended outages from routine network changes.
problems.solution: Dynamic dependency mapping with ITSM change collision overlays.

problems.problem: Wasted spend on unused software licenses.
problems.solution: Granular software metering and lifecycle management.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1p1: AIObz Consulting ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting the privacy and security of your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR - EU 2016/679), the Swedish Data Protection Act (Dataskyddslag 2018:218), and other applicable European data protection laws.
privacy.s1p2: This policy applies to all visitors of our website, users of our products (IT Control Box, ITAM, AI OBZ), and individuals who interact with us through contact forms, assessments, or other communications.
privacy.s2p1: AIObz Consulting is the data controller for the personal data processed through this website and our services. For any data protection inquiries, please contact us at:
privacy.s3p1: We may collect the following categories of personal data:
privacy.s3ContactDesc: Name, email address, phone number, organisation name — provided when you fill in contact forms, datasheet requests, or assessments.
privacy.s3UsageDesc: Pages visited, browser type, device information, IP address, and interaction patterns collected via analytics.
privacy.s3AssessmentDesc: Responses provided through our IT maturity assessment tool, including selected scopes, answers, and calculated results.
privacy.s3CommunicationDesc: Records of correspondence when you contact us.
privacy.s4p1: We process your personal data based on the following legal grounds:
privacy.s4ConsentDesc: When you voluntarily submit forms or subscribe to communications. You may withdraw consent at any time.
privacy.s4LegitimateDesc: For website analytics, improving our services, and responding to enquiries.
privacy.s4ContractDesc: When processing is necessary to perform or prepare a contract with you.
privacy.s5i1: To respond to your enquiries and provide requested information
privacy.s5i2: To process datasheet download requests and assessment submissions
privacy.s5i3: To improve our website, products, and services
privacy.s5i4: To send relevant communications (only with your consent)
privacy.s6p1: We retain personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes for which it was collected, or as required by law. Contact form submissions and assessment data are retained for a maximum of 24 months unless a longer retention period is required by law or an ongoing business relationship.
privacy.s7p1: We do not sell your personal data. We may share data with:
privacy.s7ServiceDesc: Trusted third-party providers who assist in hosting, analytics, and email delivery, bound by data processing agreements.
privacy.s7LegalDesc: When required by law or to protect our legal rights.
privacy.s7p2: Where data is transferred outside the EU/EEA, we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place, such as Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) or adequacy decisions by the European Commission.
privacy.s8p1: Our website uses essential cookies to ensure basic functionality. We may also use analytics cookies to understand how visitors interact with our site. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings. For detailed information, refer to our cookie settings on first visit.
privacy.s9p1: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorised access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. These include encryption in transit (TLS/SSL), access controls, and regular security reviews.
privacy.s10p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated "Last updated" date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
privacy.disclaimer: Disclaimer: All statements in this page and report are indicative and subject to terms, conditions, and contractual agreement. No obligation exists unless expressly agreed in a legally binding contract.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
